title: LLM Component Generator
description: Scaffold a new LLM-optimized component. By default scaffolds both Angular and React implementations.

name.description: Component name in kebab-case (e.g. 'tooltip', 'date-picker'). The 'llm-' prefix is added automatically.

directory.description: Target directory relative to each library's src/lib/. Defaults to the component name.

framework.description: Which framework(s) to scaffold. Defaults to 'all' (Angular + React + Vue).
